notes: Treat point estimates, standard errors, confidence bands, summary aggregates, and sign/monotonic diagnostics as separate tolerance families.
Do not relax tolerances without updating automation/contracts/numerical-truth-contract.md and attaching fresh rerun evidence.
Use tolerance_families as the machine-readable gate registry before any parity or Monte Carlo test sets fixture-level tolerances.

tolerance_families.calibration_rule: Set fixture-level atol/rtol from contdid-r parity outputs before asserting dose-level estimator equality.
Set fixture-level atol/rtol from bootstrap or analytic-inference parity outputs before asserting standard-error equality.
Set fixture-level atol/rtol from inference-band parity outputs before asserting confidence-interval equality.
Set fixture-level atol/rtol from treated-dose aggregation parity outputs before asserting summary-effect equality.
Support membership, sign restrictions, and monotonic-segment diagnostics must match exactly; do not relax this gate via numeric tolerances.
Event-time labels, ordering, and exposure-length semantics must match exactly; parity runs should fail on any index drift.
